verses.latin_vulgate: Et egressa est sors secunda filiorum Simeon per cognationes suas : fuitque hæreditas
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֞א הַגּוֹרָ֤ל הַשֵּׁנִי֙ לְשִׁמְע֔וֹן לְמַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵֽי־שִׁמְע֖וֹן לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָ֑ם וַֽיְהִי֙ נַחֲלָתָ֔ם בְּת֖וֹךְ נַחֲלַ֥ת בְּנֵי־יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the second lot came forth for the children of Simeon by their kindreds: and their inheritance was
verses.finnish_biblia: Senjälkeen lankesi toinen arpa Simeonin lasten sukukunnalle heidän sukuinsa jälkeen, ja heidän perintönsä oli keskellä Juudan lasten perimystä.
verses.king_james: And the second lot came forth to Simeon, even for the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families: and their inheritance was within the inheritance of the children of Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: eorum in medio possessionis filiorum Juda : Bersabee et Sabee et Molada
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י לָהֶ֖ם בְּנַחֲלָתָ֑ם בְּאֵֽר־שֶׁ֥בַע וְשֶׁ֖בַע וּמוֹלָדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the midst of the possession of the children of Juda: Bersabee and Sabee and Molada
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän perittäväksensä tuli BeerSeba, Seba ja Molada:
verses.king_james: And they had in their inheritance Beer–sheba, Sheba, and Moladah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Hasersual, Bala et Asem
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַחֲצַ֥ר שׁוּעָ֛ל וּבָלָ֖ה וָעָֽצֶם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hasersual, Bala and Asem,
verses.finnish_biblia: HatsarSual, Bala ja Atsem;
verses.king_james: And Hazar–shual, and Balah, and Azem,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Eltholad, Bethul et Harma
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶלְתּוֹלַ֥ד וּבְת֖וּל וְחׇרְמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Eltholad, Bethul and Harma,
verses.finnish_biblia: Eltolad, Betul ja Horma;
verses.king_james: And Eltolad, and Bethul, and Hormah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Siceleg et Bethmarchaboth et Hasersusa
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְצִֽקְלַ֥ג וּבֵית־הַמַּרְכָּב֖וֹת וַחֲצַ֥ר סוּסָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Siceleg and Bethmarchaboth and Hasersusa,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ziglag, Bethammarkabot ja HatsarSusa:
verses.king_james: And Ziklag, and Beth–marcaboth, and Hazar–susah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Bethlebaoth et Sarohen : civitates tredecim, et villæ earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֵ֥ית לְבָא֖וֹת וְשָׁרוּחֶ֑ן עָרִ֥ים שְׁלֹשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Bethlebaoth and Sarohen: thirteen cities, and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: BetLebaot ja Saruhen: kolmetoistakymmentä kaupunkia ja heidän kylänsä;
verses.king_james: And Beth–lebaoth, and Sharuhen; thirteen cities and their villages:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ain et Remmon et Athar et Asan : civitates quatuor, et villæ earum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַ֥יִן ׀ רִמּ֖וֹן וָעֶ֣תֶר וְעָשָׁ֑ן עָרִ֥ים אַרְבַּ֖ע וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Remmon and Athor and Asan: four cities, and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ain, Rimmon, Eter ja Asan: neljä kaupunkia kylinensä;
verses.king_james: Ain, Remmon, and Ether, and Ashan; four cities and their villages:

verses.latin_vulgate: omnes viculi per circuitum urbium istarum usque ad Baalath Beer Ramath contra australem plagam. Hæc est hæreditas filiorum Simeon juxta cognationes suas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־הַחֲצֵרִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר סְבִיבוֹת֙ הֶעָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה עַד־בַּ֥עֲלַת בְּאֵ֖ר רָ֣אמַת נֶ֑גֶב זֹ֗את נַחֲלַ֛ת מַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵֽי־שִׁמְע֖וֹן לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the villages round about these cities to Baalath Beer Ramath to the south quarter. This is the inheritance of the children of Simeon according to their kindreds,
verses.finnish_biblia: Siihen myös kaikki kylät, jotka ympäri näitä kaupungeita ovat, BaalatBeeriin asti, ja Ramatiin, etelän puoleen. Tämä on Simeonin lasten sukukunnan perimys heidän suvuissansa,
verses.king_james: And all the villages that were round about these cities to Baalath–beer, Ramath of the south. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: in possessione et funiculo filiorum Juda : quia major erat, et idcirco filii Simeon possederunt in medio hæreditatis eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵחֶ֙בֶל֙ בְּנֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֔ה נַחֲלַ֖ת בְּנֵ֣י שִׁמְע֑וֹן כִּֽי־הָיָ֞ה חֵ֤לֶק בְּנֵֽי־יְהוּדָה֙ רַ֣ב מֵהֶ֔ם וַיִּנְחֲל֥וּ בְנֵֽי־שִׁמְע֖וֹן בְּת֥וֹךְ נַחֲלָתָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: In the possession and lot of the children of Juda: because it was too great, and therefore the children of Simeon had their possession in the midst of their inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Simeonin lasten perimys on keskellä Juudan lasten osaa; ja että Juudan lasten osa oli suurempi kuin he itse, sentähden perivät Simeonin lapset osan keskellä heidän perintöänsä.
verses.king_james: Out of the portion of the children of Judah was the inheritance of the children of Simeon: for the part of the children of Judah was too much for them: therefore the children of Simeon had their inheritance within the inheritance of them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ceciditque sors tertia filiorum Zabulon per cognationes suas : factus est terminus possessionis eorum usque Sarid.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֙עַל֙ הַגּוֹרָ֣ל הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֔י לִבְנֵ֥י זְבוּלֻ֖ן לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם וַיְהִ֛י גְּב֥וּל נַחֲלָתָ֖ם עַד־שָׂרִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the third lot fell to the children of Zabulon by their kindreds: and the border of their possession was unto Sarid.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmas arpa lankesi Sebulonin lasten sukukunnalle heidän sukuinsa jälkeen, ja heidän perintönsä raja oli Saridiin asti.
verses.king_james: And the third lot came up for the children of Zebulun according to their families: and the border of their inheritance was unto Sarid:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascenditque de mari et Merala, et pervenit in Debbaseth, usque ad torrentem qui est contra Jeconam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָלָ֨ה גְבוּלָ֧ם ׀ לַיָּ֛מָּה וּמַרְעֲלָ֖ה וּפָגַ֣ע בְּדַבָּ֑שֶׁת וּפָגַע֙ אֶל־הַנַּ֔חַל אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֥י יׇקְנְעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And It went up from the sea and from Merala, and came to Debbaseth: as far as the torrent, which is over against Jeconam.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän rajansa astuu lännen puoleen Maralaan, ja ulottuu Dabbasetiin ja siihen ojaan, joka juoksee Jokneamin ohitse;
verses.king_james: And their border went up toward the sea, and Maralah, and reached to Dabbasheth, and reached to the river that is before Jokneam;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et revertitur de Sared contra orientem in fines Ceseleththabor : et egreditur ad Dabereth, ascenditque contra Japhie.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֣ב מִשָּׂרִ֗יד קֵ֚דְמָה מִזְרַ֣ח הַשֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ עַל־גְּב֥וּל כִּסְלֹ֖ת תָּבֹ֑ר וְיָצָ֥א אֶל־הַדָּבְרַ֖ת וְעָלָ֥ה יָפִֽיעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it returneth from Sarid eastward to the borders of Ceseleththabor: and it goeth out to Dabereth and ascendeth towards Japhie.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kääntyy Saridista itään päin auringon nousemisen puoleen, KislotTaborin rajan tykö, ja menee Dabratiin, ja ulottuu Japhiaan;
verses.king_james: And turned from Sarid eastward toward the sunrising unto the border of Chisloth–tabor, and then goeth out to Daberath, and goeth up to Japhia,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et inde pertransit usque ad orientalem plagam Gethepher et Thacasin : et egreditur in Remmon, Amthar et Noa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִשָּׁ֤ם עָבַר֙ קֵ֣דְמָה מִזְרָ֔חָה גִּתָּ֥ה חֵ֖פֶר עִתָּ֣ה קָצִ֑ין וְיָצָ֛א רִמּ֥וֹן הַמְּתֹאָ֖ר הַנֵּעָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it passeth along from thence to the east side of Gethhepher and Thacasin: and goeth out to Remmon, Amthar and Noa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja menee sieltä itään päin lävitse Githan, Hepherin, Ittan, Katsin, ja loppuu Rimmoniin, Mitoariin ja Neaan;
verses.king_james: And from thence passeth on along on the east to Gittah–hepher, to Ittah–kazin, and goeth out to Remmon–methoar to Neah;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et circuit ad aquilonem Hanathon : suntque egressus ejus vallis Jephthaël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָסַ֤ב אֹתוֹ֙ הַגְּב֔וּל מִצְּפ֖וֹן חַנָּתֹ֑ן וְהָיוּ֙ תֹּצְאֹתָ֔יו גֵּ֖י יִפְתַּח־אֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it turneth about to the north of Hanathon: and the outgoings thereof are the valley of Jephtahel,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja juoksee ympäri pohjan puoleen Hannatoniin päin, ja loppuu JephtaElin laaksoon;
verses.king_james: And the border compasseth it on the north side to Hannathon: and the outgoings thereof are in the valley of Jiphthah–el:

verses.latin_vulgate: et Cateth et Naalol et Semeron et Jerala et Bethlehem : civitates duodecim, et villæ earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקַטָּ֤ת וְנַהֲלָל֙ וְשִׁמְר֔וֹן וְיִדְאֲלָ֖ה וּבֵ֣ית לָ֑חֶם עָרִ֥ים שְׁתֵּים־עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Cateth and Naalol and Semeron and Jedala and Bethlehem: twelve cities and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kattat, Nahalal, Simron, Ideala ja Betlehem: kaksitoistakymmentä kaupunkia ja heidän kylänsä.
verses.king_james: And Kattath, and Nahallal, and Shimron, and Idalah, and Beth–lehem: twelve cities with their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est hæreditas tribus filiorum Zabulon per cognationes suas, urbes et viculi earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֛את נַֽחֲלַ֥ת בְּנֵי־זְבוּלֻ֖ן לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָ֑ם הֶעָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Zabulon by their kindreds, the cities and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Sebulonin lasten perimys heidän sukuinsa jälkeen, nämät heidän kaupunkinsa ja kylänsä.
verses.king_james: This is the inheritance of the children of Zebulun according to their families, these cities with their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Issachar egressa est sors quarta per cognationes suas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְיִ֨שָּׂשכָ֔ר יָצָ֖א הַגּוֹרָ֣ל הָרְבִיעִ֑י לִבְנֵ֥י יִשָּׂשכָ֖ר לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The fourth lot came out to Issachar by their kindreds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljäs arpa lankesi Isaskarin lapsille heidän sukuinsa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And the fourth lot came out to Issachar, for the children of Issachar according to their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: fuitque ejus hæreditas Jezraël et Casaloth et Sunem
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֖י גְּבוּלָ֑ם יִזְרְעֶ֥אלָה וְהַכְּסוּלֹ֖ת וְשׁוּנֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And his inheritance was Jezrael and Casaloth and Sunem,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän rajansa oli Jisreel, Kesullot ja Sunem;
verses.king_james: And their border was toward Jezreel, and Chesulloth, and Shunem,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Hapharaim et Seon, et Anaharath
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַחֲפָרַ֥יִם וְשִׁיאֹ֖ן וַאֲנָחֲרַֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hapharaim and Seon and Anaharath,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hapharaim, Sion ja Anaharat;
verses.king_james: And Hapharaim, and Shion, and Anaharath,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Rabboth et Cesion, Abes,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָרַבִּ֥ית וְקִשְׁי֖וֹן וָאָֽבֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Rabboth and Cesion, Abes,
verses.finnish_biblia: Rabbit, Kisjon ja Abets;
verses.king_james: And Rabbith, and Kishion, and Abez,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Rameth, et Engannim, et Enhadda et Bethpheses.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרֶ֧מֶת וְעֵין־גַּנִּ֛ים וְעֵ֥ין חַדָּ֖ה וּבֵ֥ית פַּצֵּֽץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Rameth and Engannim and Enhadda and Bethpheses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Remet, EnGannim, Enhadda ja BetPhatsets;
verses.king_james: And Remeth, and En–gannim, and En–haddah, and Beth–pazzez;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et pervenit terminus ejus usque Thabor et Sehesima et Bethsames, eruntque exitus ejus Jordanis : civitates sedecim, et villæ earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָגַע֩ הַגְּב֨וּל בְּתָב֤וֹר (ושחצומה) [וְשַׁחֲצִ֙ימָה֙] וּבֵ֣ית שֶׁ֔מֶשׁ וְהָי֛וּ תֹּצְא֥וֹת גְּבוּלָ֖ם הַיַּרְדֵּ֑ן עָרִ֥ים שֵׁשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the border thereof cometh to Thabor and Sehesima and Bethsames: and the outgoings thereof shall be at the Jordan: sixteen cities, and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ulottuu Taboriin, Sahatsimaan, ja BetSemekseen, ja hänen loppunsa ovat Jordanin tykönä: kuusitoistakymmentä kaupunkia kylinensä.
verses.king_james: And the coast reacheth to Tabor, and Shahazimah, and Beth–shemesh; and the outgoings of their border were at Jordan: sixteen cities with their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est possessio filiorum Issachar per cognationes suas, urbes et viculi earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֗את נַחֲלַ֛ת מַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵי־יִשָּׂשכָ֖ר לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם הֶעָרִ֖ים וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This is the possession of the sons of Issachar by their kindreds, the cities and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Isaskarin lasten sukukunnan perimys, kaupungit ja kylät heidän sukuinsa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Issachar according to their families, the cities and their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ceciditque sors quinta tribui filiorum Aser per cognationes suas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵא֙ הַגּוֹרָ֣ל הַחֲמִישִׁ֔י לְמַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵי־אָשֵׁ֖ר לְמִשְׁפְּחוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the fifth lot fell to the tribe of the children of Aser by their kindreds:
verses.finnish_biblia: Viides arpa lankesi Asserin lasten sukukunnalle heidän sukuinsa jälkeen,
verses.king_james: And the fifth lot came out for the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: fuitque terminus eorum Halcath et Chali et Beten et Axaph
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֖י גְּבוּלָ֑ם חֶלְקַ֥ת וַחֲלִ֖י וָבֶ֥טֶן וְאַכְשָֽׁף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their border was Halcath and Chali and Beten and Axaph,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän rajansa oli Helkat, Hali, Beten ja Aksaph;
verses.king_james: And their border was Helkath, and Hali, and Beten, and Achshaph,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Elmelech et Amaad et Messal : et pervenit usque ad Carmelum maris et Sihor et Labanath,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַֽלַמֶּ֥לֶךְ וְעַמְעָ֖ד וּמִשְׁאָ֑ל וּפָגַ֤ע בְּכַרְמֶל֙ הַיָּ֔מָּה וּבְשִׁיח֖וֹר לִבְנָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Elmelech and Amaad and Messal: and it reacheth to Carmel by the sea and Sihor and Labanath,
verses.finnish_biblia: Allammelek, Amead ja Miseal, ja ulottuu Karmeliin länteen päin, ja SihorLibnatiin;
verses.king_james: And Alammelech, and Amad, and Misheal; and reacheth to Carmel westward, and to Shihor–libnath;

verses.latin_vulgate: ac revertitur contra orientem Bethdagon : et pertransit usque Zabulon et vallem Jephthaël contra aquilonem in Bethemec et Nehiel. Egrediturque ad lævam Cabul,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֨ב מִזְרַ֣ח הַשֶּׁ֘מֶשׁ֮ בֵּ֣ית דָּגֹן֒ וּפָגַ֣ע בִּ֠זְבֻל֠וּן וּבְגֵ֨י יִפְתַּח־אֵ֥ל צָפ֛וֹנָה בֵּ֥ית הָעֵ֖מֶק וּנְעִיאֵ֑ל וְיָצָ֥א אֶל־כָּב֖וּל מִשְּׂמֹֽאל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it returneth towards the east to Bethdagon: and passeth along to Zabulon and to the valley of Jephthael towards the north to Bethemec and Nehiel. And it goeth out to the left side of Cabul,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kääntyy auringon nousemista käsin BetDagonia vastaan, ja ulottuu Sebuloniin ja Jephtahelin laaksoon pohjan puoleen, BetEmekiin ja Negieliin, ja loppuu Kabulin tykönä vasemmalla puolella;
verses.king_james: And turneth toward the sunrising to Beth–dagon, and reacheth to Zebulun, and to the valley of Jiphthah–el toward the north side of Beth–emek, and Neiel, and goeth out to Cabul on the left hand,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Abran et Rohob et Hamon et Cana, usque ad Sidonem magnam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֶבְרֹ֥ן וּרְחֹ֖ב וְחַמּ֣וֹן וְקָנָ֑ה עַ֖ד צִיד֥וֹן רַבָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to Abaran and Rohob and Hamon and Cana, as far as the great Sidon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ebroniin, Rehobiin, Hammoniin ja Kanaan, aina isoon Sidoniin asti.
verses.king_james: And Hebron, and Rehob, and Hammon, and Kanah, even unto great Zidon;

verses.latin_vulgate: Revertiturque in Horma usque ad civitatem munitissimam Tyrum, et usque Hosa : eruntque exitus ejus in mare de funiculo Achziba :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֤ב הַגְּבוּל֙ הָרָמָ֔ה וְעַד־עִ֖יר מִבְצַר־צֹ֑ר וְשָׁ֤ב הַגְּבוּל֙ חֹסָ֔ה (ויהיו) [וְהָי֧וּ] תֹצְאֹתָ֛יו הַיָּ֖מָּה מֵחֶ֥בֶל אַכְזִֽיבָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it returneth to Horma to the strong city of Tyre, and to Hosa: and the outgoings thereof shall be at the sea from the portion of Achziba:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kääntyy raja Raman puoleen, aina vahvaan kaupunkiin Zoriin asti, ja palajaa Hosaan päin, ja loppuu meren tykönä nuoraa myöten Aksibin tykö;
verses.king_james: And then the coast turneth to Ramah, and to the strong city Tyre; and the coast turneth to Hosah; and the outgoings thereof are at the sea from the coast to Achzib:

verses.latin_vulgate: et Amma et Aphec et Rohob : civitates viginti duæ, et villæ earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֻמָ֥ה וַאֲפֵ֖ק וּרְחֹ֑ב עָרִ֛ים עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁתַּ֖יִם וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Amma and Aphec and Rohob: twenty-two cities, and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Umma, Aphek ja Rehob: kaksikolmattakymmentä kaupunkia kylinensä.
verses.king_james: Ummah also, and Aphek, and Rehob: twenty and two cities with their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est possessio filiorum Aser per cognationes suas, urbesque et viculi earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֗את נַחֲלַ֛ת מַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵֽי־אָשֵׁ֖ר לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם הֶעָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This is the possession of the children of Aser by their kindreds, and the cities and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Asserin lasten sukukunnan perimys heidän sukuinsa jälkeen, ne kaupungit ja heidän kylänsä.
verses.king_james: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families, these cities with their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filiorum Nephthali sexta sors cecidit per familias suas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבְנֵ֣י נַפְתָּלִ֔י יָצָ֖א הַגּוֹרָ֣ל הַשִּׁשִּׁ֑י לִבְנֵ֥י נַפְתָּלִ֖י לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sixth lot came out to the sons of Nephtali by their families:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuudes arpa lankesi Naphtalin lapsille heidän sukunsa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: The sixth lot came out to the children of Naphtali, even for the children of Naphtali according to their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: et cœpit terminus de Heleph et Elon in Saananim, et Adami, quæ est Neceb, et Jebnaël usque Lecum : et egressus eorum usque ad Jordanem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י גְבוּלָ֗ם מֵחֵ֨לֶף מֵאֵל֜וֹן בְּצַעֲנַנִּ֗ים וַאֲדָמִ֥י הַנֶּ֛קֶב וְיַבְנְאֵ֖ל עַד־לַקּ֑וּם וַיְהִ֥י תֹצְאֹתָ֖יו הַיַּרְדֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the border began from Heleph and Elon to Saananim, and Adami, which is Neceb, and Jebnael even to Lecum:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän rajansa oli Helephistä, Elon Zananimin lävitse, Adami, Nekeb, JabneEl, Lakkumiin asti ja loppuu Jordaniin.
verses.king_james: And their coast was from Heleph, from Allon to Zaanannim, and Adami, Nekeb, and Jabneel, unto Lakum; and the outgoings thereof were at Jordan:

verses.latin_vulgate: revertiturque terminus contra occidentem in Azanotthabor, atque inde egreditur in Hucuca, et pertransit in Zabulon contra meridiem, et in Aser contra occidentem, et in Juda ad Jordanem contra ortum solis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֨ב הַגְּב֥וּל יָ֙מָּה֙ אַזְנ֣וֹת תָּב֔וֹר וְיָצָ֥א מִשָּׁ֖ם חוּקֹ֑קָה וּפָגַ֨ע בִּזְבֻל֜וּן מִנֶּ֗גֶב וּבְאָשֵׁר֙ פָּגַ֣ע מִיָּ֔ם וּבִ֣יהוּדָ֔ה הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן מִזְרַ֥ח הַשָּֽׁמֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the border returneth westward to Azanotthabor, and goeth out from thence to Hucuca, and passeth along to Zabulon southward, and to Aser westward, and to Juda upon the Jordan towards the rising of the sun.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja raja kääntyy lännen puoleen AsnotTaborin tykö, ja tulee sieltä hamaan Hukkokiin, ja ulottuu etelästä Sebuloniin ja lännestä Asseriin ja Juudaan asti Jordanin tykö auringon ylenemisen puoleen.
verses.king_james: And then the coast turneth westward to Aznoth–tabor, and goeth out from thence to Hukkok, and reacheth to Zebulun on the south side, and reacheth to Asher on the west side, and to Judah upon Jordan toward the sunrising.

verses.latin_vulgate: civitates munitissimæ, Assedim, Ser, et Emath, et Reccath et Cenereth,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָרֵ֖י מִבְצָ֑ר הַצִּדִּ֣ים צֵ֔ר וְחַמַּ֖ת רַקַּ֥ת וְכִנָּֽרֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the strong cities are Assedim, Ser, and Emath, and Reccath and Cenereth,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vahvat kaupungit ovat: Ziddim, Zer, Hammat, Rakkat ja Kinneret,
verses.king_james: And the fenced cities are Ziddim, Zer, and Hammath, Rakkath, and Chinnereth,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Edema et Arama, Asor
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲדָמָ֥ה וְהָרָמָ֖ה וְחָצֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Edema and Arama, Asor,
verses.finnish_biblia: Adama, Rama ja Hatsor,
verses.king_james: And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Cedes et Edrai, Enhasor,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקֶ֥דֶשׁ וְאֶדְרֶ֖עִי וְעֵ֥ין חָצֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Cedes and Edri, Enhasor,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kedes, Edrei ja Enhatsor,
verses.king_james: And Kedesh, and Edrei, and En–hazor,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jeron et Magdalel, Horem et Bethanath et Bethsames : civitates decem et novem, et villæ earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִרְאוֹן֙ וּמִגְדַּל־אֵ֔ל חֳרֵ֥ם וּבֵית־עֲנָ֖ת וּבֵ֣ית שָׁ֑מֶשׁ עָרִ֥ים תְּשַֽׁע־עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jeron and Magdalel, Horem, and Bethanath and Bethsames: nineteen cities, and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jireon, MigdalEl, Harem, BetAnat ja BetSemes: yhdeksäntoistakymmentä kaupunkia kylinensä.
verses.king_james: And Iron, and Migdal–el, Horem, and Beth–anath, and Beth–shemesh; nineteen cities with their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est possessio tribus filiorum Nephthali per cognationes suas, urbes et viculi earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֗את נַחֲלַ֛ת מַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵֽי־נַפְתָּלִ֖י לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם הֶֽעָרִ֖ים וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This is the possession of the tribe of the children of Nephtali by their kindreds, the cities and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Naphtalin lasten sukukunnan perimys heidän suvuissansa, kaupungit ja kylät.
verses.king_james: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Naphtali according to their families, the cities and their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tribui filiorum Dan per familias suas egressa est sors septima :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵי־דָ֖ן לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם יָצָ֖א הַגּוֹרָ֥ל הַשְּׁבִיעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The seventh lot came out to the tribe of the children of Dan by their families
verses.finnish_biblia: Seitsemäs arpa lankesi Danin lasten sukukunnalle heidän sukuinsa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And the seventh lot came out for the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families.

verses.latin_vulgate: et fuit terminus possessionis ejus Sara et Esthaol, et Hirsemes, id est, civitas solis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֖י גְּב֣וּל נַחֲלָתָ֑ם צׇרְעָ֥ה וְאֶשְׁתָּא֖וֹל וְעִ֥יר שָֽׁמֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the border of their possession was Saraa and Esthaol, and Hirsemes, that is, the city of the sun,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja raja heidän perimisestänsä oli Sorea, Estaol ja Irsemes,
verses.king_james: And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Ir–shemesh,

verses.latin_vulgate: Selebin et Ajalon et Jethela,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁעֲלַבִּ֥ין וְאַיָּל֖וֹן וְיִתְלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Selebin and Aialon and Jethela,
verses.finnish_biblia: Saalabbin, Ajalon ja Jitla,
verses.king_james: And Shaalabbin, and Ajalon, and Jethlah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Elon et Themna et Acron,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵיל֥וֹן וְתִמְנָ֖תָה וְעֶקְרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Elon and Themna and Acron,
verses.finnish_biblia: Elon, Timnata ja Ekron,
verses.king_james: And Elon, and Thimnathah, and Ekron,

verses.latin_vulgate: Elthece, Gebbethon et Balaath,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶלְתְּקֵ֥ה וְגִבְּת֖וֹן וּבַעֲלָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Elthece, Gebbethon and Balaath,
verses.finnish_biblia: Elteke, Gibbeton ja Baalat,
verses.king_james: And Eltekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jud et Bane et Barach et Gethremmon :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיהֻ֥ד וּבְנֵֽי־בְרַ֖ק וְגַת־רִמּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Juda and Bane and Barach and Gethremmon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jehut, BeneBarak ja GatRimmon,
verses.king_james: And Jehud, and Bene–berak, and Gath–rimmon,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Mejarcon et Arecon, cum termino qui respicit Joppen,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵ֥י הַיַּרְק֖וֹן וְהָרַקּ֑וֹן עִֽם־הַגְּב֖וּל מ֥וּל יָפֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Mejarcon and Arecon, with the border that looketh towards Joppe,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mehaijarkon ja Rakkon, sen rajan kanssa Japhoa vastaan;
verses.king_james: And Me–jarkon, and Rakkon, with the border before Japho.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ipso fine concluditur. Ascenderuntque filii Dan, et pugnaverunt contra Lesem, ceperuntque eam : et percusserunt eam in ore gladii, et possederunt, et habitaverunt in ea, vocantes nomen ejus Lesem Dan, ex nomine Dan patris sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֥א גְבוּל־בְּנֵי־דָ֖ן מֵהֶ֑ם וַיַּעֲל֣וּ בְנֵי־דָ֠ן וַיִּלָּחֲמ֨וּ עִם־לֶ֜שֶׁם וַיִּלְכְּד֥וּ אוֹתָ֣הּ ׀ וַיַּכּ֧וּ אוֹתָ֣הּ לְפִי־חֶ֗רֶב וַיִּֽרְשׁ֤וּ אוֹתָהּ֙ וַיֵּ֣שְׁבוּ בָ֔הּ וַיִּקְרְא֤וּ לְלֶ֙שֶׁם֙ דָּ֔ן כְּשֵׁ֖ם דָּ֥ן אֲבִיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And is terminated there. And the children of Dan went up and fought against Lesem, and took it: and they put it to the sword, and possessed it, and dwelt in it, calling the name of it Lesem Dan, by the name of Dan their father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siellä loppuu Danin lasten raja. Ja Danin lapset nousivat ja sotivat Lesemiä vastaan, ja voittivat sen ja löivät sen miekan terällä, omistivat sen ja asuivat siinä, ja kutsuivat Lesemin Daniksi, isänsä Danin nimeltä.
verses.king_james: And the coast of the children of Dan went out too little for them: therefore the children of Dan went up to fight against Leshem, and took it, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and possessed it, and dwelt therein, and called Leshem, Dan, after the name of Dan their father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est possessio tribus filiorum Dan, per cognationes suas, urbes et viculi earum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֗את נַחֲלַ֛ת מַטֵּ֥ה בְנֵי־דָ֖ן לְמִשְׁפְּחֹתָ֑ם הֶעָרִ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה וְחַצְרֵיהֶֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: This is the possession of the tribe of the sons of Dan, by their kindreds, the cities and their villages.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Danin lasten sukukunnan perintö heidän suvuissansa, nämät kaupungit ja niiden kylät.
verses.king_james: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families, these cities with their villages.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque complesset sorte dividere terram singulis per tribus suas, dederunt filii Israël possessionem Josue filio Nun in medio sui,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַלּ֥וּ לִנְחֹל־אֶת־הָאָ֖רֶץ לִגְבוּלֹתֶ֑יהָ וַיִּתְּנ֨וּ בְנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֧ל נַחֲלָ֛ה לִיהוֹשֻׁ֥עַ בִּן־נ֖וּן בְּתוֹכָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had made an end of dividing the land by lot to each one by their tribes, the children of Israel gave a possession to Joshua the son of Nun in the midst of them,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin he olivat lakanneet jakamasta maata rajoinensa, antoivat Israelin lapset Josualle Nunin pojalle perinnön heidän seassansa,
verses.king_james: When they had made an end of dividing the land for inheritance by their coasts, the children of Israel gave an inheritance to Joshua the son of Nun among them:

verses.latin_vulgate: juxta præceptum Domini, urbem quam postulavit Thamnath Saraa in monte Ephraim : et ædificavit civitatem, habitavitque in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־פִּ֨י יְהֹוָ֜ה נָ֣תְנוּ ל֗וֹ אֶת־הָעִיר֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר שָׁאָ֔ל אֶת־תִּמְנַת־סֶ֖רַח בְּהַ֣ר אֶפְרָ֑יִם וַיִּבְנֶ֥ה אֶת־הָעִ֖יר וַיֵּ֥שֶׁב בָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: According to the commandment of the Lord, the city which he asked for, Thamnath Saraa, in mount Ephraim: and he built up the city, and dwelt in it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja antoivat hänelle Herran käskyn jälkeen sen kaupungin, jota hän anoi, joka oli TimnatSera Ephraimin vuorella; siellä hän rakensi kaupungin ja asui siinä.
verses.king_james: According to the word of the Lord they gave him the city which he asked, even Timnath–serah in mount Ephraim: and he built the city, and dwelt therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ sunt possessiones, quas sorte diviserunt Eleazar sacerdos, et Josue filius Nun, et principes familiarum ac tribuum filiorum Israël in Silo, coram Domino ad ostium tabernaculi testimonii : partitique sunt terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה הַנְּחָלֹ֡ת אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִחֲל֣וּ אֶלְעָזָ֣ר הַכֹּהֵ֣ן ׀ וִיהוֹשֻׁ֪עַ בִּן־נ֟וּן וְרָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָב֣וֹת לְמַטּוֹת֩ בְּנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֨ל ׀ בְּגוֹרָ֤ל ׀ בְּשִׁלֹה֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד וַיְכַלּ֕וּ מֵחַלֵּ֖ק אֶת־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: These are the possessions which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the princes of the families, and of the tribes of the children of Israel, distributed by lot in Silo, before the Lord at the door of the tabernacle of the testimony, and they divided the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat ne perimiset, jotka pappi Eleatsar ja Josua Nunin poika ja ylimmäiset Israelin lasten sukukuntain isistä arvalla jakoivat Silossa Herran edessä, seurakunnan majan oven tykönä; ja niin lopettivat maan jakamisen.
verses.king_james: These are the inheritances, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, divided for an inheritance by lot in Shiloh before the Lord, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation. So they made an end of dividing the country.
